commit.message:
fix: wrap file upload in try/catch to prevent stuck uploading state

If /api/upload returns non-JSON (e.g. Render 500 HTML error), res.json()
would throw and uploading/uploadingIdx state would stay true forever,
permanently disabling the upload button. Fixed in cart, academy, and admin
store pages using finally block to guarantee state is reset.

- Shows spinner while uploading, image preview after upload
- URL field still editable manually as fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: plan renewal at $19 + remove commission on upgrades/renewals

Renewal rules:
- First activation (NONE → plan): full price + 20% sponsor commission
- Upgrade (BASIC→PRO etc.): differential price, NO commission
- Renewal (same plan): fixed $19 USD, NO commission, extends expiry

Changes:
- pack-requests: allow same-plan renewal at $19 (AppSetting PRICE_RENEWAL);
  block only downgrades; extend plan_expires_at on renewal CRYPTO path
- admin/purchases: allow renewal approval; extend expiry (not reset);
  commission only when currentRank === 0
- purchases/verify cron: detect renewal by plan match; extend vs set plan;
  commission only on first activation
- activate-plan: allow renewal; extend expiry; commission only from NONE

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stale WebSocket disconnect marking pod offline after agent restart

When rc-agent is killed and restarted, the old zombie TCP connection's
cleanup handler would unconditionally remove agent_senders and mark the
pod offline — even though a newer connection had already registered.
Added monotonic conn_id tracking (agent_conn_ids map) so the cleanup
handler skips state changes when a newer connection has superseded it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix operator credential cold-start restore not populating in-memory cache (#10) (#10)

Three issues caused session_status to report "not_configured" even when
operator credentials were vaulted:

1. session_status never triggered _ensure_operator_credentials(), so after
   any process restart the in-memory global stayed None until something
   else (begin_oauth, paid tool) happened to call it.

2. _ensure_operator_credentials() had `except Exception: pass` — silently
   swallowed all cold-start vault restore failures with zero logging.

3. _on_schwab_credentials_received() returned an empty dict with no
   logging when credential keys didn't match (app_key/secret), making
   it impossible to diagnose vault restore key mismatches.

Fixes:
- session_status now calls _ensure_operator_credentials() before reporting
- Cold-start path logs vault restore result and diagnostic info
- Callback logs when credential keys don't match expected format

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
build: successful PyInstaller build + post-build cleanup

- .gitignore: new file — excludes build/, dist/, venv/, __pycache__/,
  saves/, and common IDE/OS files. Prevents the ~1.4 GB dist output
  from being committed accidentally.

- MonsterWorld.spec: remove pygame._view from hiddenimports — that
  sub-module was removed in pygame 2.x and caused a harmless but
  noisy warning during the build.

- README.md: update bundle size estimate to accurate ~1.4 GB figure
  (dominated by the Fantasy RPG Complete OST music tracks).

Build confirmed working: dist/MonsterWorld/MonsterWorld.exe launches
the game; newassets/ and data/ are correctly bundled inside _internal/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: await async getToken() in all file upload and download methods

Seven direct fetch() calls were missing await on getToken(), causing
the Authorization header to be "Bearer [object Promise]" instead of
the actual token. Fixes CSV/Excel import, image upload, CSV export,
and image ZIP download returning 401.

Security hardening: fix CORS, CSP, auth, and data handling vulnerabilities

- Fix origin check: use exact match instead of startsWith to prevent subdomain bypass
- Remove unsafe-eval from CSP script-src directive
- Upgrade IP hashing from SHA-256 concat to HMAC-SHA256 with stronger default key
- Use service role key (with anon fallback) in server-side chat API route
- Add comprehensive security headers to admin site via netlify.toml
- Harden admin auth: 30-min session TTL, timing-safe password comparison, artificial delay
- Auto-logout on session expiry with activity-based refresh
- Fix CSV formula injection in admin exports (sanitize cell prefixes)
- Deduplicate Supabase client in PageAnalyticsTracker (use shared instance)
- Sanitize error logging to prevent leaking Supabase details

still dispatching any pending scheduled posts each day.

feat: implement CT.gov API v2 client (Step 4)

Adds ClinicalTrialsClient with:
- search() supporting condition, intervention, sponsor, free-text,
  status/phase filters, max_results cap, and optional progress callback
- Paginated fetching via nextPageToken
- get_trial() for single NCT ID lookup (returns None on 404)
- Exponential backoff retry (4 attempts, 1.5x factor) via urllib3
- 429 rate-limit handling with Retry-After header respect
- Input validation with ValueError on unknown status/phase values

Removes filter.studyType (not a valid CT.gov v2 parameter).

commit.message:
feat: DataForSEO 順位トラッキング機能を追加

- DataForSEO API クライアント（class-dataforseo-client.php）
  - Google Organic Search Live/Advanced API 連携
  - desktop/mobile 両方の SERP 順位取得
  - レートリミット対応（30回/分）
  - www./非www. ドメインマッチング
- DB テーブル: gcrev_rank_keywords（キーワード設定）+ gcrev_rank_results（順位結果）
- REST API 6エンドポイント（gcrev/v1/rank-tracker/*）
  - rankings: ユーザー向け順位一覧（最新+前回比）
  - history: キーワード別週次推移
  - keywords: 管理者向けキーワード管理（GET/POST/DELETE）
  - fetch: 手動フェッチ
- 管理画面: 順位トラッキング設定ページ
  - API接続テスト、ユーザー別キーワード管理、手動/一括取得
- Cron: 週次自動取得（月曜05:00、本番のみ）
  - チャンク処理（5ユーザーずつ自己チェーン）
  - ISO週重複防止、ロック制御
- ユーザー向けページ（page-rank-tracker.php）
  - サマリーカード、ソート対応テーブル、CSVエクスポート
  - 順位変動表示（↑↓→）、圏外表示
- サイドバーに「検索順位チェック」メニュー追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix soularr PATH: use Nix packages instead of raw paths

The NixOS `path` option appends /bin to each entry, so raw paths like
"/run/current-system/sw/bin" became "/run/current-system/sw/bin/bin".
Use actual Nix packages (pkgs.bash etc) which resolve correctly.

commit.message:
Fix n8n tool body: convert JSON Schema to placeholder format

n8n toolHttpRequest expects {placeholder} syntax in the body with
placeholderDefinitions, not raw JSON Schema. Now properly transforms
tool body properties into {"date": "{date}"} format with placeholder
definitions containing descriptions for the AI to fill in.

Fix transcript: move caption fetching to client side

Server returns only captionUrl via Innertube. Browser then fetches the
actual JSON3 caption content directly, bypassing YouTube's datacenter
IP blocking on Vercel. Added parseJson3() to lib/transcript.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[EMI-209] Blue/green zero-downtime deployments (#200)

* [EMI-209] Implement blue/green zero-downtime deployments

Adds the infrastructure for zero-downtime deploys using port alternation
and Cloudflare tunnel-based traffic switching.

Prerequisites (EMI-202, EMI-203, EMI-207):
- Atomic compare-and-swap dispatch to prevent double-dispatch race
- Graceful HTTP shutdown via server.close() with 2s drain timeout
- External tunnel mode (ORCA_EXTERNAL_TUNNEL) to decouple cloudflared

Blue/green deploy (EMI-209):
- --scheduler-paused CLI flag for standby instance startup
- POST /api/deploy/drain and /api/deploy/unpause control endpoints
- Port-aware pidfiles (orca-{port}.pid) to avoid collision
- Scheduler state module for cross-module handle access
- deploy-blue-green.sh orchestration script with health check,
  tunnel switching, graceful drain, and automatic rollback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix prettier formatting in routes.ts and cli/index.ts

commit.message:
Add background email sync, E2E fixes, JobTread integration, and cabinet specs

Background email sync system:
- Add /api/emails/background-sync route with 15-min staleness check
- Add BackgroundSync component in root layout (fire-and-forget on page load)
- Pre-fetch email data server-side on emails page (no loading spinner)
- EmailDashboard accepts initial data props, shows cached data instantly
- Increase Vercel cron from daily to every 15 minutes

E2E audit and performance fixes:
- Fix React hydration mismatches in mobile components
- Optimize bids page query (SELECT specific columns vs *)
- Fix hamburger menu accessibility and mobile viewport
- Move home page email fetch to server-side parallel queries
- Silence expected Supabase RLS console errors across services

JobTread integration:
- Pave API client with rate limiting and pagination
- Sync service: costItems, tasks, dailyLogs, comments, files
- MCP server with 9 tools for live queries
- Cron sync at 7:55 AM daily

Other:
- Cabinet specs import script (140 boxes, all painted white)
- Agentic project assistant with multi-turn tool execution
- E2E audit script with Playwright
